purpose: {{One-sentence statement of what this document establishes and for whom. This field becomes the subtitle under the title.}}
method: {{How the findings were produced: sources consulted (primary over secondary), extraction method, verification steps. Becomes the italic method line.}}
headline_findings: {{Finding 1 — lead with the number, follow with the meaning.}}
{{Finding 3 — include at least one finding that cuts AGAINST the convenient story; this document family always does.}}

section_one_name.summary: {{Paragraph. Dict keys become headings — rename these keys to real section names.}}

section_two_name.summary: {{Lists of same-shaped dicts render as tables; lists of strings render as bullets; nested dicts become sub-headings.}}

caveats_and_gaps: {{Explicit limitation 1 — what could not be verified and why, stated rather than smoothed over.}}
